mapper.insert: insert into email_code (email, code, create_time, status) values (#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into email_code
email,
code,
create_time,
status,
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update: update email_code set status = 1 where email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status = 0
update email_code set status = 0 where email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status = 1
